name: composio
description: Use the hosted Composio app for direct SaaS actions and the local Composio CLI for files, scripts, and reproducible automation across 1,000+ apps.

interface.longDescription: Work across Slack, GitHub, Gmail, Notion, Linear, and 1,000+ other apps. Use hosted Composio tools for direct SaaS actions and the local CLI for files, scripts, pipelines, and reproducible automation, with managed authentication on both surfaces.
defaultPrompt: Summarize my unread email and draft replies.
Turn new GitHub issues into Linear tickets.
Find this week's meetings and post a Slack brief.
